agent.name: Freight Control Tower
agent.description: AI-powered freight booking exception management agent for TE Connectivity Transportation Operations. Monitors inbound forwarder emails, auto-triages to Microsoft Planner, and provides conversational shift briefings and exception management.

topicList.description: Welcome message when user opens a chat
Exception queue summary with aging and top 5 priority tasks
Search Planner tasks by booking ID or forwarder name
Close a resolved exception in Planner
Filtered exception views by priority, age, or bucket

agentFlows.name: Freight Exception Email to Planner Task
agentFlows.description: Triggers on new email in admin@ mailbox. Classifies exception type and priority using keyword rules. Creates Microsoft Planner task in Freight Booking Exceptions plan.
steps: Extract subject, body, and sender from email
Classify priority: High if urgent/penalty/demurrage/expedite keywords detected
Classify bucket: Documentation | Missing Info | Clarification based on keywords
Parse Booking ID (BKG-YYYY-NNNNN) and Shipment ID (TE-SHP-NNNNNN) from email body
Get Planner Plan ID for 'Freight Booking Exceptions'
Get Bucket ID for classified bucket name
Create Planner task with title, description, priority value, bucket, and +24h due date
m365Connectors: Office 365 Outlook — When a new email arrives (V3)
Microsoft Planner — Get plans in a group (V3)
agentFlows.note: This flow must be created as a Copilot Studio Agent Flow (not standalone Power Automate). Connection authentication uses the agent's configured M365 identity.

m365Copilot.note: Enable in Phase 2 after Microsoft 365 Copilot licensing is confirmed

conversationStarters.title: High priority exceptions
conversationStarters.text: Show me all high priority exceptions

conversationStarters.title: Aged exceptions
conversationStarters.text: What exceptions are aged over 24 hours?

conversationStarters.title: Help
conversationStarters.text: What can you help me with?

deploymentChecklist.title: Provision M365 sandbox tenant
deploymentChecklist.details: Confirm M365 E5 or equivalent sandbox with Teams, Planner, and Outlook

deploymentChecklist.title: Create admin@ mailbox
deploymentChecklist.details: Create shared mailbox admin@[tenant].onmicrosoft.com for freight exceptions

deploymentChecklist.title: Create Planner plan
deploymentChecklist.details: Create 'Freight Booking Exceptions' plan with 3 buckets: Missing Info, Documentation, Clarification

deploymentChecklist.title: Note Planner IDs
deploymentChecklist.details: Record the Planner plan ID and bucket IDs — needed for Agent Flow configuration

deploymentChecklist.title: Create Copilot Studio agent
deploymentChecklist.details: Create new agent in Copilot Studio, paste freight_control_tower_agent.mcs.yml settings

deploymentChecklist.title: Import topics
deploymentChecklist.details: Paste each .mcs.yml topic into Copilot Studio topic editor (code view)

deploymentChecklist.title: Create Agent Flow
deploymentChecklist.details: Create Agent Flow inside Copilot Studio (not standalone PA). Configure Outlook + Planner connectors

deploymentChecklist.title: Seed sample emails
deploymentChecklist.details: Send the 5 sample forwarder emails to admin@ to test the Agent Flow and Planner task creation

deploymentChecklist.title: Test topics in CS canvas
deploymentChecklist.details: Test all 5 topics: shift briefing, lookup, mark complete, summary, help

deploymentChecklist.title: Deploy to Teams
deploymentChecklist.details: Publish agent and add to TE Connectivity Freight Ops team channel
